script_text: Some spellings are tricky. Letters hide or change sound!
These are surprises English throws at us.
Let us learn a few common ones.
In knee, the K is silent.
In lamb, the B is silent.
In write, the W is silent too!
When P and H team up, they make the F sound!
Phone. Photo. Dolphin. All PH words that sound like F.
When a word surprises you, write it down. Then practice it a few times!
Now you are ready to read tricky spellings!
